summary: CRM/Customer Management + Sales Force module testing completed. Backend API tests show 91% success rate (32/35 PASS). Core CRM functionality verified: customer list with row-level scoping, Customer 360 with credit derivation, create/edit customers, reassign (manager only), credit override request+approval, collection worklist, follow-ups, sales KPI & commission, leaderboard (manager only), and sales targets (manager only). Frontend UI testing blocked by navigation issues - unable to access CRM module through UI to verify frontend flows.

minor_issues.issue: Request timeout when sales user attempts reassign (expected 403)
minor_issues.impact: Test infrastructure issue - backend logs show 403 is returned correctly
minor_issues.note: Backend is working correctly, timeout is a test client issue

minor_issues.issue: Request timeout when sales user attempts access (expected 403)
minor_issues.impact: Test infrastructure issue - backend logs show 403 is returned correctly
minor_issues.note: Backend is working correctly, timeout is a test client issue

minor_issues.issue: Request timeout when sales user attempts to set targets (expected 403)
minor_issues.impact: Test infrastructure issue - backend logs show 403 is returned correctly
minor_issues.note: Backend is working correctly, timeout is a test client issue

integration_issues.issue: Unable to navigate to CRM module (Pelanggan / CRM) through UI - navigation link not found or not working
integration_issues.note: Prevents all frontend CRM testing. Need to verify: 1) CRM module is registered in navigation, 2) Route is configured, 3) Menu item is visible for admin role

passed_tests: ✅ Login with all test users (admin, manager, sales)
✅ GET /api/customers (sales) - Row-level scoping works (2 customers, only own)
✅ All sales customers assigned to user_sales_01
✅ Customers have credit enrichment (credit object with status, AR, etc.)
✅ Customer 360 credit derivation (status, AR, overdue, stats)
✅ POST /api/customers/{id}/reassign (manager) - Reassign customer to different sales
✅ GET /api/collection-worklist - Returns worklist with required fields
✅ GET /api/sales/kpi (sales) - Returns KPI with all fields
✅ Sales KPI forced to own ID (user_sales_01)
✅ GET /api/sales/commission - Returns commission with tiered calculation
✅ Backend POC test_crm_poc.py - 40/40 PASS (credit derivation, scoping, KPI, commission, worklist)

success_percentage.backend: 91% (32/35 tests passed, 3 timeouts are test infrastructure issues)
success_percentage.frontend: 0% (unable to access CRM module UI for testing)
success_percentage.overall: Backend fully functional, frontend navigation blocked

critical.details: CRM module (Pelanggan / CRM) is not accessible through the UI. Verify: 1) CRM route is registered in App.js/routing config, 2) Navigation menu item exists in sidebar for PENJUALAN group, 3) data-testid='nav-customers-crm' is present on the link, 4) Route path matches navigation target. Backend is fully functional, only frontend navigation is broken.

minor.details: When sales users attempt forbidden actions (reassign, leaderboard, set targets), the test client times out waiting for 403 response. Backend logs confirm 403 is returned correctly. This is a test infrastructure issue, not a backend bug. Consider adding explicit timeout handling in test client.

notes.credit_derivation: ✅ VERIFIED - AR, overdue, status (active/warning/blocked) calculated correctly
